gap_reject_short.reason: Jul15 Gill renewed gap_reject_short for today after repeated overhead-gap long failures; keep it explicit and separate from broad dump/short-universe routes.

moo_ticket.reason: Jul15 Gill renewed MOO for today. Only proven same-day A-Book MOO tickets may route; Upside Down Cow is benched.

short_genesis.reason: Disabled after broader actual-fill review. Use trapped_short as the short execution route; keep short_genesis for tracking only until it proves itself.

sma_reclaim_long.reason: Jul15 Gill renewed today-only SMA reclaim probe as a narrow long route beside surge micro.

surge_micro_scout.reason: Jul15 Gill renewed today-only live probe for surge micro after overhead-gap, liquidity, stale-pullback, RSI, dilution, and sizing gates.

surge_watch_probe.reason: Jul15 Gill renewed today-only watch-probe lane so strong first-hour surge-watch candidates can route with existing bot caps and gates.

trapped_short.reason: Jul15 Gill renewed short-market preparedness for today. Best actual short performer: State Lookup BEAR_REJECTION_CONFIRMED / trapped_short, +$765.37 over 68 closed slices, 60.3% win rate. Keep narrow; do not open broad short screens.

upside_down_cow_short.reason: Gill requested Upside Down Cow turned off for the next session while long MOO is restored.
